queryString: SELECT SUM(value) FROM archive WHERE addInfo = 'Motion' AND timestamp >= strftime('%s','now') - 86400;
SELECT round(AVG(value),2) AS avg_last_24h FROM archive WHERE deviceName = 'Korytarz' AND addInfo = 'DHT22 temperature: ' AND timestamp >= strftime('%s','now') - 86400;
SELECT round(AVG(value),2) AS avg_last_24h FROM archive WHERE deviceName = 'Korytarz' AND addInfo = 'DHT22 humidity: ' AND timestamp >= strftime('%s','now') - 86400;
